heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 15, 1953, ch. 506, § 167 Stat. 590
label: 265, 266 Repealed. ,Aug. 15, 1953, ch. 506, § 167 Stat. 590
notes: Section 265, R.S. § 2135, prohibited certain purchases and sales within Indian country by persons other than Indians.
Section 266, R.S. §§ 467, 2136, prohibited sale of arms in district occupied by uncivilized or hostile Indians.
